subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: The Reuters news agency telegraphed that a Baha'í by the name of Mr. Dodd was proceeding for India. Reuters only sends telegrams for such prominent personages
subcodes.first_line_orig: شرکت خبرگزاری رویتر تلگراف نموده که مستر داد بهائی عازم هندوستان است
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @prophecy and fulfillment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @East and West; communication between East and West, @rejection, opposition and persecution
